data.title: Old National Bancorp Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from Old National Bancorp Capital ( (ONB) ).

On August 13, 2025, Old National Bancorp announced its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per share on its common stock, payable on September 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 5, 2025. Additionally, a quarterly cash dividend of $17.50 per share on its 7.0% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series A and C, was declared, payable on November 20, 2025, to shareholders of record as of November 5, 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (ONB) stock is a Buy with a $63.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Old National Bancorp Capital stock, see the ONB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ONB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ONB is a Outperform.

Old National Bancorp Capital’s strong financial performance and successful corporate events are key strengths. The stock’s valuation and technical indicators suggest moderate growth potential, while economic uncertainties and competitive pressures are notable risks.

To see Spark’s full report on ONB stock, click here.

More about Old National Bancorp Capital

Old National Bancorp, headquartered in the Midwest, is the sixth largest commercial bank in the region, serving clients primarily in the Midwest and Southeast. With approximately $71 billion in assets and $38 billion under management, it ranks among the top 25 banking companies in the U.S. The company offers consumer and commercial banking, wealth management, and capital markets services, and is recognized as one of the most community-minded companies in the U.S.

data.title: USP Group Limited Updates on Legal and Financial Proceedings
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from USP Group Limited ( (SG:BRS) ) is now available.

USP Group Limited, currently under judicial management, is navigating significant legal and financial challenges. The company announced that UOB has provided executed documents for the discharge and release of security, excluding corporate guarantees, related to facilities extended to its subsidiaries. Additionally, the High Court has allowed the withdrawal of UOB’s winding-up applications against USPI and Supra S without any cost orders. The trading suspension of the company’s shares, initiated on 23 February 2024, remains in effect.

More about USP Group Limited

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$3.79M

data.title: Shineroad International Reports Mixed Interim Financial Results for 2025
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Shineroad International Holdings Limited ( (HK:1587) ) just unveiled an update.

Shineroad International Holdings Limited reported a 6.2% increase in revenue to RMB317.0 million for the first half of 2025 compared to the same period in 2024. Despite the revenue growth, the company’s profit attributable to owners decreased by 6.3% to RMB17.7 million, and no interim dividend was recommended. The financial results indicate a mixed performance with revenue growth but declining profitability, which may impact stakeholder confidence.

More about Shineroad International Holdings Limited

Shineroad International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the food industry. It focuses on the production and distribution of food ingredients, catering to various market segments.

data.title: Sibanye-Stillwater Reports Strong Earnings Growth Amid Operational Challenges
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Sibanye Stillwater ( (SBSW) ) has issued an announcement.

Sibanye-Stillwater announced a significant increase in headline earnings per share (HEPS) for the first half of 2025, with figures expected to be more than 100% higher than the same period in 2024. This improvement is attributed to increased profitability from South African gold operations and operational restructuring. However, the company also reported a basic loss per share due to impairment losses related to its US PGM operations and the Keliber lithium project, influenced by changes in US legislation and lower forecast lithium prices. Production updates revealed consistent output across most operations, though challenges in South African gold operations led to a 13% decline in production year-on-year. The company anticipates improved performance in the latter half of 2025, driven by higher PGM prices and resolved operational issues.

The most recent analyst rating on (SBSW) stock is a Hold with a $4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sibanye Stillwater stock, see the SBSW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SBSW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SBSW is a Neutral.

The overall stock score for Sibanye Stillwater reflects a mix of financial challenges and positive technical indicators. The company’s financial struggles, including negative profitability and liquidity concerns, weigh heavily on the score. However, the stock’s technical position is relatively positive, providing some balance. The negative P/E ratio further underscores the financial challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on SBSW stock, click here.

More about Sibanye Stillwater

Sibanye-Stillwater is a multinational mining and metals processing group with operations across five continents. It is one of the largest global producers of platinum, palladium, and rhodium, and a leading gold producer. The company is also involved in battery metals mining and processing, and has a significant presence in recycling and mine tailings retreatment.

Average Trading Volume: 10,638,321

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $6.06B

data.title: Planetree International Development Limited Enhances Governance with Nomination Committee
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Planetree International Development Limited ( (HK:0613) ) just unveiled an update.

Planetree International Development Limited has established a nomination committee within its board of directors, aiming to enhance governance and ensure diverse representation. The committee, formed in March 2012, consists of at least three members, primarily independent non-executive directors, and includes at least one member of a different gender. The committee is tasked with overseeing nominations and is empowered to seek independent professional advice to fulfill its responsibilities, reflecting the company’s commitment to robust governance practices.
